indexedRecord.description: An AT Protocol record as indexed by the AppView from the firehose. The AppView is a cache; the record on the provider's PDS remains the source of truth. `body` is the raw lexicon record JSON for the record at `uri`.

body.description: The lexicon record JSON. Validate it against the NSID in `collection`.

verifyFinding.description: A single structural, cryptographic, or hardware-attestation finding produced while verifying a record. A finding with severity `error` means the verification failed.

activityStat.description: Request + token counts within a single time window.

activityWindows.description: Activity rolled up across the four standard windows: last hour, day (24h), week (7d), and month (30d).
